Sandbox_LaserAndGunLightUseBattery: Laser and Gun Light Use Batteries
Sandbox_LaserAndGunLightUseBattery_toolt: Use green batteries to power lasers and gun lights.
Sandbox_GGSGS_LootAmount_tooltip: Scales how often Guns Project items appear (0 removes them, Everywhere! is very common).
Sandbox_GGSGS_Pre1994LootOnly_tooltip: If enabled, Gael Gun Store weapons and attachments introduced after 1993 are removed from loot and automatic weapon upgrades.
Sandbox_GGSGS_weaponpart_wear_by_shot_to: If enabled, attached weapon parts lose condition on every shot and can break.
Sandbox_GGSGS_AttachmentsLowerChance_too: Chance for non-silencer attachments to lose 1 condition per shot. Lower values wear faster.
Sandbox_GGSGS_SilencersLowerChance_toolt: Chance for silencers to lose 1 condition per shot. Lower values wear faster.
Sandbox_GGSGS_weapon_random_condition_to: If enabled, newly generated firearms spawn with a random condition value.
Sandbox_GGSGS_weaponpart_loot_max_condit: Loot weapon parts spawn at max condition
If enabled, loose weapon parts and weapon-attached parts spawn fully repaired.
Sandbox_GGSGS_weaponpart_random_conditio: Weapon parts spawn with random condition
If enabled and max-condition is disabled, loose parts and attached parts spawn with random condition.
Sandbox_GGSGS_DevAttachmentSpawner_toolt: If enabled, the 3DUI attachment selector can create missing compatible weapon parts for development.
Sandbox_GGSGS_ManualRack_tooltip: If enabled, automatic racking is disabled. You must rack manually after each shot/reload cycle, and dry racking is allowed.
Sandbox_GGSGS_canon_pistol_sup: Silencer spawn rate on pistol spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_canon_revolver_type: Silencer spawn rate on revolver spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_canon_rifle_sup: Silencer spawn rate on rifle spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_canon_shotgun_sup: Silencer spawn rate on shotgun spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_canon_smg_sup: Silencer spawn rate on SMG spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_grip_grip_normal: Standard grip spawn rate on weapons.

Sandbox_GGSGS_handguard_ar_hg: Handguard spawn rate on AR spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_handguard_svd_hg: Handguard spawn rate on SVD spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_handguard_win_hg: Handguard spawn rate on Winchester spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_l_scope_ak_mount_scope: Optic mount spawn rate on AKs.
Sandbox_GGSGS_laser_pistol_laser: Laser spawn rate on pistol spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_laser_rifle_laser: Laser spawn rate on rifle spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_light_pistol_light: Flashlight spawn rate on pistol spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_light_rifle_light: Flashlight spawn rate on rifle spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_misc: Camo wrap spawn rate on weapons.
Sandbox_GGSGS_mount_ak_mount: Mount spawn rate on AK spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_mount_rifle_mount: Mount spawn rate on rifle spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_mount_shotgun_mount: Mount spawn rate on shotgun spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_scope_large_scope: Large optic spawn rate on weapon spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_scope_medium_scope: Medium optic spawn rate on weapon spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_scope_mini_scope: Mini optic spawn rate on weapon spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_stock_ak_type: Stock spawn rate on AK spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_stock_ar_type: Stock spawn rate on AR spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_stock_mosin_type: Stock spawn rate on Mosin spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_stock_pistol_type: Stock spawn rate on pistol spawns.
Sandbox_GGSGS_stock_revolver_type: Stock spawn rate on revolver spawns.
